claim: Stdin file-list mode discarded the provided file list and fell back to scanning the derived parent directory instead.
evidence: cmd/gogent-scout/main.go:26-45 collected stdin paths but only derived a directory target; cmd/gogent-scout/native_scout.go:48-166 walked ns.Target unless explicit files were supplied.
runtimeTrigger: Run `find src -name '*.go' | gogent-scout - "Analyze Go codebase"` and the report includes sibling files that were never piped on stdin.

claim: Session-end cleanup still removed a raw session-id cache filename after permission-gate switched to hashed cache filenames, leaving stale allow-session caches behind.
evidence: cmd/gogent-archive/main.go:281-289 built gofortress-perm-cache-{sessionID}.json, while cmd/gogent-permission-gate/cache.go:14-20 writes gofortress-perm-cache-{sha256(sessionID)}.json.
runtimeTrigger: Allow a tool for the session through gogent-permission-gate, end the session, then start a later session with the same runtime dir and observe the old hashed cache file still present.
